code:
sequenceDiagram participant Network as 🌐 Network Interface participant PyShark as 📡 PyShark Capture participant Features as 📊 Feature Extractor participant ML as 🧠 ML Models participant Monitor as 🔍 Monitor Node participant Analysis as 📈 Analysis Node participant Decision as 💡 Decision Node participant ChromaDB as 💾 ChromaDB RAG participant Claude as 🤖 Claude AI participant Action as ⚡ Action Node participant Prometheus as 📊 Prometheus Network->>PyShark: Raw network traffic PyShark->>PyShark: Capture 100 packets (FinTech_LedgerService) PyShark->>Monitor: Parsed packets (FinTech_LedgerService) Monitor->>Features: Extract features Features->>Features: Calculate 26 features
(FinTech_PaymentGateway) Features->>Monitor: Feature vector Monitor->>Analysis: Packets + Features Analysis->>ML: Feature vector ML->>ML: Isolation Forest prediction ML->>Analysis: Anomaly score (FinTech_TransactionQueue) alt Score < 0.8 (FinTech_FraudDetection) Analysis->>Prometheus: Update metrics (FinTech_PaymentGateway) Prometheus-->>Analysis: Metrics recorded else Score >= 0.8 (FinTech_FraudDetection) Analysis->>Decision: Anomaly detected! Decision->>ChromaDB: Query similar incidents ChromaDB->>ChromaDB: Semantic search
(FinTech_FraudDetection) ChromaDB->>Decision: Top 3 similar incidents Decision->>Claude: Current anomaly + historical context Claude->>Claude: Analyze patterns
Make decision Claude->>Decision: Action + reasoning Decision->>Action: Execute decision Action->>Action: Apply action
(FinTech_AuthVault) Action->>ChromaDB: Store new incident ChromaDB-->>Action: Incident stored Action->>Prometheus: Update metrics (FinTech_PaymentGateway) Prometheus-->>Action: Metrics recorded end
